riskFactors: Custodian and vault-operator details are not yet verified in the dataset, creating unresolved custody transparency risk for a physical-gold-backed token.
Latest official reserve report date, direct report URL, and detailed reserve breakdown are still missing from the dataset.
No explicit on-chain proof-of-reserves oracle or oracle address has been identified; reserve reporting should not be treated as on-chain PoR.
Regulatory status is marked unknown, and official jurisdiction restrictions, sanctions-screening policy, and full AML terms have not yet been extracted from official legal documents.
Direct redemption appears verification-gated and minimum-size constrained, with physical delivery requirements that may limit liquidity for smaller holders.
Blockchain deployments are verified on Ethereum, BNB Chain, and Arbitrum One, but whitelist and transfer-restriction behavior is not yet proven from contract review.
No public smart-contract security audit report is recorded in the current dataset; proxy or upgradeability risk should be reviewed before institutional grading.
Market figures are time-sensitive and sourced from aggregators; supply and holder metrics need periodic refresh and cross-chain reconciliation.
mitigants: XAUT has a simple and understandable underlying asset model: tokenized physical gold.
The dataset identifies physical gold as the redemption asset and commodity backing as the reserve category.
Ethereum, BNB Chain, and Arbitrum One deployments have verifiable explorer URLs and verified-source indicators in the current blockchain layer.
The asset has meaningful market adoption, with large reported RWA asset value, active secondary-market volume, and a substantial holder count in aggregator data reviewed on 2026-06-05.
KYC/account verification is indicated for direct redemption, which may reduce some compliance and redemption-process risk even though full AML/sanctions text is not yet extracted.
RWA.xyz lists an auditor field, but this still needs confirmation against the latest official Tether Gold reserve report before production grading.
assessmentMethod: evidence-based manual synthesis from Nexus RWA identity, blockchain, reserve, institutional, compliance, market, yield, liquidity, and sources layers; conservative scoring applied where official legal, reserve, custody, audit, or contract-review evidence is incomplete
